div1.entryFree:
Range, vb. 1) intr. to roam, to rove at large: As I, 3, 70. R2 III, 2, 39. H4B I, 1, 174. H5 III, 3, 12. H6C II, 1, 11. Caes. II, 1, 118. III, 1, 270. Hml. III, 3, 2. Metaphorically, == to be inconstant: if I have --d, like him that travels I return again, Sonn. 109, 5. if once I find thee --ing, Hortensio will be quit with thee by changing, Shr. III, 1, 91.
2) tr. to roam, to rove through: he did r. the town to seek me out, Tw. IV, 3, 7.
